case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO RIVERA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO RIVERA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO $1,101.49 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,181.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED MAR-24-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,101.49 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO RIVERA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $452.53 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, MAGDANIEL S. RUBIO
